{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221947073C01578AF70BCE81B83C"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617124727153066776","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"没人评论，那我先开始吧这本虽然主角没有系统但是还是非常不错的，也把人物描绘得很好也吧人的内心描绘了出来。值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773501889,"group_id":"7612114054433229848","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N31UarLYp3Barv+AcGbAVoKj+6vbNSTvsFe7n7JC9qPG","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2063151391580573","user_name":"爱吃水熘豆腐的芳仪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2063151391580573","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612114054433229848","book_info":{"abstract":"一觉醒来，我成了《七龙珠》里的克林。
那个光头小和尚，地球人的天花板，赛亚人身边的背景板。
但我有一个优势——我知道所有剧情。
我知道龟仙人在哪，知道大长老能开发潜力，知道弗利萨会捏爆我，知道18号会成为我老婆。
可我也知道——
我知道雅木茶会被栽培人炸死，但我救不了。
我知道自己会被弗利萨杀死，但我躲不掉。
我知道沙鲁会变成完全体，但我阻止不了。
我只是一个知道剧情的地球人。
可正是因为我什么都知道，我才要比原著里更拼。
因为我想试一试——
地球人，能不能打破那个该死的极限？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/728f0e5cd2cc82f08d358dd8aefa027b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"执笔的狗","author_id":"","book_id":"7612114054433229848","book_name":"我，克林，打破地球人极限","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8a858","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2009人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":376,"name":"龙珠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=376&name=龙珠&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7612114152915485208","read_count":"2009","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"184547"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"59","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,异世大陆,天才,扮猪吃虎,同人,龙珠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/728f0e5cd2cc82f08d358dd8aefa027b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364028&x-signature=0z4nW2PTPpTGFQvipYdFMYnQ6SA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"678822777461801","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"22"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221947073C01578AF70BCE81B83C"}"},"relate_
